text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Astonishing! Even trainers of legend have never
won every G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well done! Your feats will be remembered here
for generations to come, you legend of Tracen
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Th-these tears of joy! You should receive the
highest of accolades for the marvelous bond
you've formed with your racers.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I really can't thank you enough... for seeing my
dream to fruition!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, shall we continue to marvel at the
pristine glitter of a chamber brimming with
trophies?
